mac.notes: Phone battery now shows in the Mac menu bar with low-battery alerts. Mirrored notifications get real action buttons (snooze, archive, dismiss) right on the Mac banner. Incoming calls show a banner with Silence and Decline. Plus a built-in help (?) on every feature.

android.notes: Send your battery and calls to the Mac: an incoming call shows on your Mac with Silence and Decline, and notification action buttons work from the Mac banner. New Calls section (grant call permissions to enable it). Plus a built-in help (?) on every feature.
